properties.remark: A WEAK TORNADO /EF0/ PRODUCED INTERMITTENT TREE DAMAGE ALONG A NEARLY 5 MILE LONG TRACK IN NOTHERN SHAWANO COUNTY FROM 331 PM TO 340 PM. TORNADO WAS WITNESSED BY PROPERTY OWNER NORTHWEST OF GRESHAM.

A WEAK TORNADO /EF1/ DESTROYED A BARN AND A GARAGE. IT ALSO PARTIALLY TORE THE ROOF OFF A HOME...DAMAGED WINDOWS TO ANOTHER HOUSE...AND SNAPPED AND UPROOTED SEVERAL TREES. THE TORNADO TRACK WAS 50 YARDS WIDE...740 YARDS LONG AND WAS ON THE GROUND FROM 437 PM TO 444 PM.
BARN DESTROYED OFF OF GRUENSTERN RD. BRICK HOUSE WITH ROOF DAMAGE.

A WEAK TORNADO /EF0/ TORE OFF PART OF OF A BARN AND SENT WOODEN PALLETS INTO A NEARBY FIELD. THE TORNADO TRACK WAS 25 YARDS WIDE...81 YARDS LONG AND WAS ON THE GROUND FROM 503 PM TO 504 PM.

A WEAK TORNADO /EF1/ UPROOTED AND SNAPPED TREES IN HALF AND PRODUCED MINOR DAMAGE TO A HOUSE. THE TORNADO TRACK WAS 50 YARDS WIDE...1340 YARDS LONG AND WAS ON THE GROUND FROM 556 PM TO 600 PM.
